description_long: This office building features a striking Y-shaped footprint with three distinct wings radiating from a central core, creating a dynamic and modern architectural presence. The exterior is composed of alternating bands of dark, glossy material and blue-tinted glass, giving the facade a layered, horizontal emphasis. The roof is flat and features a bold, geometric pattern in black and white, adding visual interest and a sense of movement. Each wing of the building curves gently outward, and the facade is punctuated by regularly spaced, rectangular windows that wrap around the structure. The base of the building is slightly recessed, creating a shadow line and emphasizing the layered construction. The overall design suggests a contemporary, high-end office environment with a focus on both aesthetics and functionality.
description: A modern, Y-shaped office building with curved wings, layered dark and blue glass facades, and a bold geometric roof pattern.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the building's Y-shaped layout and the prominent geometric roof pattern, with the layered facade and curved wings clearly visible.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the central core and the symmetrical extension of the three wings, emphasizing the horizontal bands and window arrangement.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a side perspective, showcasing the curvature of the wings and the alternating dark and blue glass layers.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the rear of the building, revealing the continuous window bands and the smooth, sweeping curves of the structure.
attribute_window_pattern: Continuous horizontal bands of rectangular windows wrap around each wing, evenly spaced and regularly repeated.
